overall.description: A first-person exploration through a cyberpunk urban environment, starting on a wet city street with a sports car, then proceeding through narrow neon-lit alleys, a dark corridor, and emerging into a back street with a parked truck before continuing through a commercial alley with NPCs. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality rendering and a vivid neon color palette.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk city street with a black sports car parked in front. The car accelerates and drives away at 2 seconds, revealing more of the green commercial buildings lining the street. The camera continues walking forward toward a narrow alley entrance.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow covered alleyway marked by yellow concrete barricades. The alley features commercial signage including a prominent SPHERE shop sign and large illuminated advertisements. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction as the camera proceeds deeper into the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a very dark narrow service corridor with graffiti-covered walls and minimal lighting from pink neon tubes. The camera walks through this enclosed space for several seconds before approaching a bright exit at the far end.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor, the scene opens into a back street loading area with a large green flatbed truck parked in the center. The camera navigates around the truck, passing a large red digital billboard and an orange apartment building, before re-entering a covered alley near the Kutsurogi Cafe.

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a narrow commercial alley featuring arcade machines and the Kutsurogi Cafe. The camera passes a group of four NPCs sitting at an outdoor table playing a game, with a tattooed man standing nearby. The alley is decorated with hanging paper lanterns and various neon signs as the camera proceeds deeper into the district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, wet city street through a series of increasingly claustrophobic corridors before emerging into a vibrant commercial district. It begins on a rain-slicked road where a black sports car accelerates away, clearing the view of green commercial buildings as the camera advances toward a narrow alley. As the camera enters this passage, the environment shifts into a covered walkway defined by yellow concrete barricades and glowing SPHERE signage, before plunging into a dark, graffiti-strewn service corridor lit only by dim pink neon tubes. The scene then opens from the darkness into a bright back street loading area, navigating around a large green flatbed truck and past a red digital billboard toward an orange apartment building. Finally, the camera glides into a lively commercial alley decorated with paper lanterns and arcade machines, passing a group of NPCs gathered outside the Kutsurogi Cafe.
